themes.name: Technical Issues and Bugs
themes.description: Users experience frequent bugs, crashes, and technical errors while using the app.
top_quotes: Many bugs are coming while trading in apps and they are irritating me.
External funds tracking has been paused which was one of the USP of this app.

themes.name: Customer Support and Responsiveness
themes.description: Users express frustration with slow or unresponsive customer support.
top_quotes: customer care is verey slow, not responding on time, showing wrong data.
Terrible experience the app auto-liquidated my mutual funds and refuses to provide any update on the liquidated amount

themes.name: Performance and Speed
themes.description: Users experience slow app performance, lag, and delayed transactions.

themes.name: Charges and Fees
themes.description: Users express dissatisfaction with high brokerage fees and charges.
top_quotes: worst app, very high brokerage, and also very worst in order execution
Not at all useful for trading platforms, they are taking tax and other charges from my earned stocks which sucks

themes.name: User Experience and Features
themes.description: Users praise the app's ease of use, but also request additional features and improvements.
top_quotes: I love this app! It's easy to use and I can be me without worrying about being judged!
please provide essay mobile number and email change options unlimited time
